Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0022",
  "title": "数据基石：误差控制在 10%以内的确定性发行",
  "page_index": 17,
  "page_range": "17"
}

Section text:
数据基石：误差控制在 10%以内的确定性发行  
在欧美等成熟市场，风险控制的核心在于建立高精度的预测模型。通过自创的“流水半衰期”监控模型，将 LTV模型误差控制在 10%以内，能够为长达 3-9个月不
同的回本周期提供决策依据，确保买量投入的稳定性与安全性。
●

message.content:
**Topics:** Risk control in user acquisition, predictive modeling, deterministic publishing strategies.
**Entities/Markets:** Mature markets (Europe, US); proprietary “流水半衰期” (Revenue Half-Life) monitoring model; LTV (Lifetime Value) model.
**Metrics & Thresholds:** LTV prediction error ≤10%; supported payback cycles of 3–9 months.
**Procedures/Methods:** Utilizes a self-developed “Revenue Half-Life” monitoring model to forecast LTV, providing decision support for varying payback periods and stabilizing marketing spend allocation.
**Claims:** High-precision predictive models are the core of risk control in mature markets. Keeping LTV model error within 10% guarantees the stability and safety of user acquisition investments across 3–9 month return windows.
**Evidence Types:** Internal proprietary model performance metrics; comparative market practice assertions. No tables or figures are included in this section.

     同的回本周期提供决策依据，确保买量投入的稳定性与安全性。
     ●"

2.  **Deconstruct the Section Text for Retrieval Elements:**
   - *Topics:* Risk control in mature markets (Europe/US), predictive modeling, user acquisition/publishing strategy, LTV (Lifetime Value) modeling, payback period analysis.

   - *Dates/Timeframes:* 3-9个月 (3-9 months payback period).
   - *Definitions/Concepts:* “流水半衰期”监控模型 (Self-created monitoring model), LTV模型误差 (LTV model error), 回本周期 (Payback period), 买量投入 (User acquisition spending/investment).
   - *Procedures/Methods:* Building high-precision predictive models for risk control; using the "Revenue Half-Life" monitoring model to control LTV error; using the model to inform decisions for different payback periods.
   - *Claims:* High-precision predictive models are the core of risk control in mature markets. Controlling LTV model error within 10% ensures stability and safety of user acquisition investments.
   - *Metrics:* 误差控制在 10%以内 (Error controlled within 10%), 回本周期 3-9个月 (Payback period of 3-9 months).

   - **Procedures/Methods:** Utilizes a self-developed “Revenue Half-Life” monitoring model to predict LTV with high precision, enabling data-driven decisions for varying payback cycles and stabilizing user acquisition spending.
   - **Claims:** In mature markets, risk control relies on high-precision predictive models. Maintaining LTV prediction error within 10% ensures the stability and safety of marketing investments across 3–9 month payback windows.
   - **Evidence/Support:** Internal model performance metrics (error rate, payback cycle coverage); industry practice reference (mature market risk control standards).

response_text:
**Topics:** Risk control in user acquisition, predictive modeling, deterministic publishing strategies.
**Entities/Markets:** Mature markets (Europe, US); proprietary “流水半衰期” (Revenue Half-Life) monitoring model; LTV (Lifetime Value) model.
**Metrics & Thresholds:** LTV prediction error ≤10%; supported payback cycles of 3–9 months.
**Procedures/Methods:** Utilizes a self-developed “Revenue Half-Life” monitoring model to forecast LTV, providing decision support for varying payback periods and stabilizing marketing spend allocation.
**Claims:** High-precision predictive models are the core of risk control in mature markets. Keeping LTV model error within 10% guarantees the stability and safety of user acquisition investments across 3–9 month return windows.
**Evidence Types:** Internal proprietary model performance metrics; comparative market practice assertions. No tables or figures are included in this section.
